home.title: Singapore Financial System
home.subtitle: Convenient & Secure
home.description: A smart campus payment platform helping parents and students easily manage expenses, top-ups, and subsidies.
home.feature1_desc: Access the system quickly and securely through the Singpass national identity gateway.
home.feature2_desc: Easily set up recurring top-up schedules or track automated school subsidies.
home.feature3_desc: All spending, top-ups, and subsidy transactions are detailed in real-time.
home.ready_desc: Log in to experience the most convenient school payment method.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Learn how to manage, top up, and use your Education Account.
faq.q1: What is an Education Account used for?
faq.a1: This is a dedicated digital account for students, parents, and staff to pay for school-related expenses such as meals, school buses, or canteen purchases.
faq.q2: How do I log into my account?
faq.a2: Account Holders can use the Singpass gateway to log in securely and quickly without needing to remember a password.
faq.q3: What are the ways to top up my account?
faq.a3: You can manually top up via payment gateways, set up scheduled automated top-ups, or receive automated funds from school subsidy programs.
faq.q4: What is FAS (Financial Assistance Scheme) and how does it work?
faq.a4: If a student is eligible for FAS, the school's system will automatically top up subsidy funds into the Education Account periodically for campus expenses.
faq.q5: Where can I view my spending and subsidy history?
faq.a5: All transactions including top-ups, expenses, and FAS subsidies received are detailed in the 'Transaction History' section on your profile page.

contact.title: Contact Us

contact.status_online: During working hours - Ready to support
contact.emergency_desc: Need to lock your account urgently or report an unusual transaction? Our rapid response team is always on standby.
